Name: insertUsers
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "display_name", $3::citext AS "email", $4::bool AS "disabled", $5::text AS "default_role", $6::varchar AS "locale", $7::bool AS "email_verified", $8::bool AS "is_anonymous" UNION ALL SELECT $9::uuid AS "id", $10::text AS "display_name", $11::citext AS "email", $12::bool AS "disabled", $13::text AS "default_role", $14::varchar AS "locale", $15::bool AS "email_verified", $16::bool AS "is_anonymous" UNION ALL SELECT $17::uuid AS "id", $18::text AS "display_name", $19::citext AS "email", $20::bool AS "disabled", $21::text AS "default_role", $22::varchar AS "locale", $23::bool AS "email_verified", $24::bool AS "is_anonymous") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "auth"."users" ("id", "display_name", "email", "disabled", "default_role", "locale", "email_verified", "is_anonymous") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."display_name", check_mutation_result."email", check_mutation_result."disabled", check_mutation_result."default_role", check_mutation_result."locale", check_mutation_result."email_verified", check_mutation_result."is_anonymous" FROM check_mutation_result RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."display_name" AS "displayName", mutation_result."email" AS "email", mutation_result."disabled" AS "disabled", mutation_result."default_role" AS "defaultRole", mutation_result."locale" AS "locale", mutation_result."email_verified" AS "emailVerified", mutation_result."is_anonymous" AS "isAnonymous" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
